title: Post mortem mapping of connectional anatomy for the validation of diffusion MRI
abstract: This work combines ex vivo high-resolution diffusion MRI with optical imaging and tracer injections in the same brains, enabling ground-truth validation of tractography algorithms at mesoscopic resolution and revealing both strengths and systematic biases.
notes: Author list is approximate and needs verification. Represents Yendiki's work on ground-truth validation of diffusion tractography.
